description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with an L-shaped floor plan, featuring multiple rooms and open spaces visible through large windows. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, and the roof appears flat, with some areas possibly accommodating rooftop utilities or small garden spaces. Several large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light, especially along the longer facade, while the shorter wing includes more private, enclosed rooms. The property is landscaped with a few palm trees and shrubs, adding greenery to the urban setting. The main entrance is marked by a distinct door and a small overhang, while the rear and side facades show a mix of window sizes and arrangements. The overall design is modern, with clean lines and a focus on functional, open living spaces.
description: A modern, L-shaped single-story bungalow with large windows, flat roof, and landscaped greenery. The exterior is light gray with a mix of open and private spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, a prominent door, and a series of large windows along the longer facade.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the landscaped area with palm trees and shows the open-plan living spaces through expansive windows.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the private, enclosed rooms in the shorter wing and the rear facade's window arrangement.
description_view_3: This view displays the rear and side facades, with a mix of window sizes and a clear view of the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
